name: Chickpea, red rice, and artichoke salad
intro: This recipe features Camargue red rice, a chewy grain with a deep maroon color and nutty flavor. As well as being a great meal in itself, the salad also makes a wonderful side for chicken dishes.

ingredients.item: salt and freshly ground black pepper
Camargue red rice or long-grain brown rice
red chile, seeded and finely chopped
handful of flat-leaf parsley, finely chopped
(For the dressing) juice of 1 large orange
(For the dressing) coriander seeds, lightly crushed

method: For the dressing, place all the ingredients in a small bowl and mix well. Taste and adjust the seasoning as required.
Place the rice in a large pot of salted water and cook according to the package instructions until tender. Drain well and transfer to a serving bowl.

While the rice is still warm, stir in the chickpeas, artichokes, chile, and herbs, and mix well. Pour the dressing over the rice mixture and toss to coat. Taste and adjust the seasoning. Top with the pine nuts and feta cheese and serve.
